notes: HAR-299 runtime-backed coverage for productVariantAppendMedia and productVariantDetachMedia. The referenced product media validation capture supplies Shopify media payload and validation evidence; the runtime test executes both variant media roots directly, verifies append/detach payloads, validates missing product/variant/media branches, and checks ProductVariant.media read-after-write effects without deleting product-level media. The generic parity runner does not replay this multi-step variant-media relationship flow as a single captured proxy request.
